caption: Two men sit side-by-side in a room, positioned in front of a television displaying the glowing text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt and maintains a neutral, slightly skeptical facial expression. The man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace, resting his chin on his hand with a contemplative look. Behind them is a shelf filled with stacked media cases and a black soundbar beneath the TV. A small inset video screen is overlaid in the center of the scene, showing dark footage. In the later frames, subtitles appear at the bottom of the inset screen that read, "But where do I go from here?". Throughout the sequence, the men remain relatively still, with only slight shifts in their facial expressions as they watch the content on the screen.
